description.value:
A one-handed war pick that punctures armor, wounds, and trips enemies, with a unique escalating bleed wound mechanic.

TrainingPropertiesSpecial
BasicOne-Handed, Melee d8Punch, Puncture, Sunder, Trip, Wound

rmeData.masterPerk: When you Wound, roll a d10. The enemy takes that damage instead of the normal Wound mechanics, and each round after that, it takes 1 fewer damage. You can refresh this Wound with a higher roll than the damage the enemy took on its previous turn.
